title: Midterm Exam - Tuesday, Oct 21
content:
Midterm exam is scheduled for Tuesday, Oct 21.

 

This week I will post a practice midterm with solutions and a study guide to help you with the preparation. If we have time, we will cover some of these materials in class. 

 

For your convenience, I'm reattaching the exam logistics:

1) The exam will be in class (in person) and it will last 1 hour and 15 minutes

2) The exam is closed books/notes and no access to accepi.

3) You will be required to use Excel (blank spreadsheets only)

4) You are allowed to use a formula sheet (one page, front and back). You are allowed to create your own formula sheet, and it can include anything that you think will help you during the test. The formula sheet has to be printed (cannot be stored on your laptop or tablet). 

5) I will ask that you upload your exam work on Canvas (Excel spreadsheet + pictures of your hand work)

6) If you require accommodations, I will contact you separately this week to give you some options

 

Please let me know if you have questions,

Julian

Midterm exam is scheduled for Tuesday, Oct 21.
 
This week I will post a practice midterm with solutions and a study guide to help you with the preparation. If we have time, we will cover some of these materials in class. 
 
For your convenience, I'm reattaching the exam logistics:
1) The exam will be in class (in person) and it will last 1 hour and 15 minutes
2) The exam is closed books/notes and no access to accepi.
3) You will be required to use Excel (blank spreadsheets only)
4) You are allowed to use a formula sheet (one page, front and back). You are allowed to create your own formula sheet, and it can include anything that you think will help you during the test. The formula sheet has to be printed (cannot be stored on your laptop or tablet). 
5) I will ask that you upload your exam work on Canvas (Excel spreadsheet + pictures of your hand work)
6) If you require accommodations, I will contact you separately this week to give you some options
 
Please let me know if you have questions,
